body: Namaste Mr. Sharma, Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy here. Your metformin, atorvastatin, telmisartan stock runs out on 2026-04-28. Same dose/brand pack can be kept ready. Free home delivery to saved address. Reply CONFIRM to dispatch, or call us if dose changed.
rationale: Refill message is precise, respectful, includes medicines and due date, and avoids clinical advice.
